_note: SYNTHETIC recorded-shape Open Legislation response mirroring the GCN/25-A reflow case: subdivision 1 lands INLINE on the section-heading line ('§ 25-a. ... public holiday. 1. When ...') while subdivision 2 starts its own line. PLACEHOLDER content, NOT statute text; exists only to regression-test that the subdivision-count metric detects the heading-line marker and reads 2, not 1. Never promote to golden.

result.text:
§ 25-a. Placeholder deadline extension heading sentence that runs
  long enough to clear the length floor and ends here. 1. When any
  placeholder period of time ends on a Saturday, Sunday or a public
  holiday, such act may be done on the next succeeding business day.
  2. Where time is extended, such extended time shall not be included
  in the placeholder computation, except for month-based periods.
result.title: Placeholder deadline extension
